title: Ultimate Creative Menu
description: The menu for the ultimate creative modpack :)
body:
![Pack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0c299d4cae457023344dee891cb2c7365d29963_0.webp)
# Description
This pack changes the background of the menu to be a calming image of mountains, along with changing the title to ultimate creative, seeing as this pack is intended to be used within the [Ultimate Creative Modpack.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultimate-creative) 

If you unzip the resource pack when you download it, you will find a directory named ```other_panoramas```, and opening this will show you other optional panorama images that you can use to be displayed on your menu screens.

## Follow this tutorial to change the menu panorama:
1. Locate the ```other_panoramas``` directory in the resource pack.
2. Choose the image you want.
3. Move it into ```assets/minecraft/textures/gui/title/background```
4. Delete ```panorama_overlay```
5. Rename your chosen image to ```panorama_overlay```
6. Go back into your game and run f3 + t (Fn + f3 + t on mac)
7. Enjoy your new panorama!

## Images
